name: feature-flag-platform
description: LaunchDarkly-style feature flag platform with API, dashboard and TypeScript SDK.

scripts.dev: npm run build -w packages/shared && concurrently -n api,dashboard -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w apps/api" "npm run dev -w apps/dashboard"
scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/sdk && npm run build -w apps/api && npm run build -w apps/dashboard
scripts.test: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/shared && npm run test -w packages/sdk
scripts.typecheck: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run typecheck -w apps/dashboard && npm run typecheck -w apps/api && npm run typecheck -w packages/sdk && npm run typecheck -w packages/shared
